channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

1. Nintendo "Cagey" About Letting Games On Switch 2, Wants To Avoid "Slop Fest"  Nintendo Life

  3. Dungeons of DUSK dev says Nintendo doesn't want Switch 2's eShop to become "a giant slop fest"  GoNintendo
  4. Nintendo is reportedly ‘cagey’ about which games appear on the Switch 2 eShop to prevent on onslaught of ‘slop’  Nintendo Wire
  5. Indie game studio says Switch 2 dev kits are more accessible, but Nintendo fears shovelware slop  Notebookcheck

  4. PS1 RPG Making a Surprise Return, Expected to Launch on PS5  Yahoo Tech

item.title: Valve Confirms Steam Frame is Still Coming This Year, Now Marked as "coming soon" - Road to VR
item.description:

  2. Valve Says New Steam Machine, Controller, and Frame Will Still Land in 2026  PCMag
  3. Steam Machine May Be Delayed After All—Still Shipping in 2026  TechPowerUp
  4. Valve insists it will release Steam Machine and Steam Frame in 2026, after blog said it ‘hoped’ to  Video Games Chronicle
  5. Valve says it still plans to ship the Steam Machine in 2026  The Verge
